audit.metaDescription: Neighborhood pizza and pasta in Lake in the Hills with made-from-scratch thin crust, stuffed deep dish, pasta dinners, garlic bread sandwiches, and direct call-first ordering. Visit at 6 Miller Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156. Rated 4.5 on Google with 250+ reviews.

What Regulars Order Official menu items and Restaurantji favorites that give the first call some direction. Restaurantji favorite Wise Guy Sandwich Mortadella, salami, ham, Canadian bacon, provolone, lettuce, tomato, black olive, onion, pickle, and hot giardiniera with house Italian dressing. $12 Menu Pasta dinner Lasagna Dinner A repeat favorite in public reviews. Dino's pasta dinners include a garlic stick and your choice of meat or marinara sauce. $13 Menu Shareable starter Beer Nuggets Golden beer nuggets served with Dino's pizza sauce. Also available in a parmesan garlic version on the official menu. $8 Menu Pick Your Pizza Lane The official menu gives Dino's a much stronger story than the current homepage does. These are the formats worth leading with. audit.visibleAboveFold: Dino's Closed · opens tomorrow at 4pm Home Menu Highlights Hours & Location Contact Call Now About Dino's A family-run neighborhood pizza and pasta shop with dine-in, takeout, delivery, beer, and enough menu depth to keep regulars rotating back. Family owned and operated 4.5 Google rating 250+ Google reviews 4 PM Typical opening time Dino's is a small family-owned and operated restaurant in old town Lake in the Hills, built around pizza, pasta, beer, and a neighborhood regulars feel. The menu has real range: crispy thin crust made from scratch daily, double dough, old fashioned in-the-pan pizza, stuffed Chicago-style deep dish, gluten-free crust, pasta dinners, sandwiches on garlic bread, and a bar setup built around beer and game-on-TV energy.
